minimal_context: The student is transitioning from a math lesson to a science lesson while the teacher attempts to manage classroom noise.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Taleisha, stop talking and go to the back of the room so we can start our science projects.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to go to the back of the room right now and sit in the chair.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Gets up from her seat loudly, pushes her chair around angrily, and stomps to the back of the room. She refuses to sit in the chair and sits on top of a desk instead.) Man! I hate this class! I don’t know why I’m in trouble. I wasn’t doing anything!

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: I am losing my patience. Go to Ms. Lewis’s room for a class suspension.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Refuses to get up and leave the room. She sits on the floor under the desk with her face in her hands, crying.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Taleisha, stop talking and go to the back of the room so we can start our science projects.

STUDENT: But I didn’t do anything!

TUTOR: You need to go to the back of the room right now and sit in the chair.

STUDENT: (Gets up from her seat loudly, pushes her chair around angrily, and stomps to the back of the room. She refuses to sit in the chair and sits on top of a desk instead.) Man! I hate this class! I don’t know why I’m in trouble. I wasn’t doing anything!

TUTOR: I am losing my patience. Go to Ms. Lewis’s room for a class suspension.

STUDENT: (Refuses to get up and leave the room. She sits on the floor under the desk with her face in her hands, crying.)
